title: Fix video continuation
description: History Video: decouple Extend/New-shot from empty frame-section gating (they self-capture last frame; kill Select.../text-op-jump/end-frame-focus-jump). Add CONTINUE VIDEO section header; rename buttons to Extend / New shot. Fix-now only — continuation migrates to a dedicated Extend App later (removed from History then). Punted to App: resolution-snap, 4-8 frame smooth-extend, omni multi-input, audio, model-pin.
